creator: ctyz1999+bugzilla@gmail.com
text:
Hello
The commit 546357 broke FUSE port option.

It removed

SHA256 (udfclientfs-0.6.tgz) = a115ef941ee56df3a14a3919e7225f046bef9577afbed7e873b1a868b3c0b301
SIZE (udfclientfs-0.6.tgz) = 27648

from distinfo.

Adding it back seems to fix the build.

I only noticed because my poudriere build failed.
